title: Add retry logic for SeaweedFS release uploads

source.subject: ci: enhance S3 upload with retry logic for transport errors

body:
Adds **retry logic** for SeaweedFS/S3 transport errors during release uploads.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`4678fe4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/4678fe4)
- **Subject:** ci: enhance S3 upload with retry logic for transport errors
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`

## Relation
Follow-up to **release-upload-keys**.
